name: Block Bonez
description: Resurrecting the NFT space with our revolutionary Dynamic Trait System, offering personalisation and rarity based rebates. Each Bare Bone NFT has an associated multiplier, and when fused with trait NFTs, they generate a passive income for the owner (based on rarity). Rebates are paid in FLR, the native asset of the Flare Network, and claimable every single block.
